title: Instagram Follower Counter (Camoufox)
description: Fetches follower counts for Instagram usernames using Camoufox (stealthy Firefox) with multiple session rotation. Bypasses bot detection at the browser fingerprint level.

usernames.title: Usernames
usernames.description: Instagram usernames to look up. Do not include the @ symbol.

sessions.title: Instagram Sessions
sessions.description:
One entry per Instagram account. The actor rotates through them automatically when one gets rate limited.

How to get sessionId + csrfToken:
1. Log in to Instagram in Chrome
2. DevTools → Application → Cookies → https://www.instagram.com
3. Copy 'sessionid' and 'csrftoken' values

Format:
[
  { "sessionId": "abc123", "csrfToken": "xyz789" },
  { "sessionId": "def456", "csrfToken": "uvw012" }
]

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies strongly recommended for Instagram.
